example: A. Rodriguez doubled to right field, 2 RBI; E. Kulhanek scored, unearned; G. Jones scored, unearned.

pattern: PLAYER grounded into double play ss to 2b; PLAYER out on the play.
example: E. DeCleene grounded into double play ss to 2b; A. Mulhern out on the play.

pattern: PLAYER doubled to center field; PLAYER advanced to third.
example: E. Kulhanek doubled to center field; K. Xiao advanced to third.

pattern: PLAYER grounded out to 3b, RBI; PLAYER advanced to third; PLAYER scored.
example: D. Borrison grounded out to 3b, RBI; E. Kulhanek advanced to third; K. Xiao scored.

pattern: PLAYER singled up the middle, RBI; PLAYER advanced to third; PLAYER scored.
example: C. Lundin singled up the middle, RBI; S. Wicker advanced to third; A. Delgado scored.

pattern: PLAYER grounded out to 1b unassisted, RBI; PLAYER advanced to second; PLAYER scored, unearned.

pattern: PLAYER doubled down the lf line, RBI; PLAYER scored, unearned.
example: G. Jones doubled down the lf line, RBI; C. Lundin scored, unearned.

pattern: PLAYER grounded out to 1b unassisted; PLAYER advanced to second; PLAYER advanced to third.
example: S. Wicker grounded out to 1b unassisted; A. Delgado advanced to second; A. Mulhern advanced to third.

pattern: PLAYER singled down the lf line, 2 RBI; PLAYER scored; PLAYER scored.
example: C. Lundin singled down the lf line, 2 RBI; A. Rodriguez scored; S. Wicker scored.

pattern: PLAYER singled, bunt, advanced to second on a throwing error by 3b; PLAYER advanced to third on the throw.
example: E. DeCleene singled, bunt, advanced to second on a throwing error by 3b; P. Penny advanced to third on the throw.

pattern: PLAYER singled to right center, 2 RBI; PLAYER scored, unearned; PLAYER scored.
example: A. Mulhern singled to right center, 2 RBI; E. DeCleene scored, unearned; P. Penny scored.

pattern: PLAYER flied into double play cf to third base; PLAYER out on the play.
example: D. Borrison flied into double play cf to third base; J. Colgan out on the play.

pattern: PLAYER doubled to left field; PLAYER advanced to third.
example: M. Abernethy doubled to left field; J. Colgan advanced to third.

pattern: PLAYER grounded out to p, bunt; PLAYER advanced to second; PLAYER advanced to third, out at home 1b to c.
example: E. DeCleene grounded out to p, bunt; P. Phillips advanced to second; E. Kulhanek advanced to third, out at home 1b to c.

pattern: PLAYER singled to pitcher, RBI; PLAYER scored.
example: J. Colgan singled to pitcher, RBI; S. Wicker scored.

pattern: PLAYER singled up the middle, advanced to third on a throwing error by cf, RBI; PLAYER scored.
example: C. Lundin singled up the middle, advanced to third on a throwing error by cf, RBI; J. Colgan scored.

pattern: PLAYER singled down the rf line, advanced to second on the throw, 2 RBI; PLAYER scored; PLAYER scored.
example: E. Kulhanek singled down the rf line, advanced to second on the throw, 2 RBI; C. Lundin scored; A. Delgado scored.

pattern: PLAYER grounded out to ss, RBI; PLAYER advanced to second; PLAYER scored, unearned.
example: E. Kulhanek grounded out to ss, RBI; C. Lundin advanced to second; J. Colgan scored, unearned.

pattern: PLAYER singled to right field, RBI; PLAYER advanced to second; PLAYER advanced to third; PLAYER scored.

pattern: PLAYER out at first lf to cf, SAC, RBI; PLAYER scored.
